title: CGPSC State Service Exam SSE Mains Admit Card 2026 for 238 Post
short_information: Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission has released the State Service Exam SSE recruitment advertisement for 238 posts. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this Chhattisgarh SSE recruitment can Download Pre Result. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, age limit, pay scale and all other information. application_fee: General / Other State : 400/- Chhattisgarh Reserve : 300/- Correction Fee: 500/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking CGPSC SSE PCS Pre
eligibility: Read the Notification. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification. How to Fill CGPSC SSE PCS Pre Recruitment Online Form 2025 CGPSC SSE PCS Pre Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 01/12/2025 to 30/12/2025 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in CGPSC SSE PCS Pre Recruitment 2025. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
